name: forgeflow
description: A local-first, approval-gated flow from product idea to tested and reviewed code.

interface.shortDescription: Guide work from idea to tested, reviewed code.
interface.longDescription: Forgeflow routes work to product brainstorming, focused planning, or large-scale wayfinding, then carries an approved change through local specs, implementation plans, task-by-task TDD, implementation, and review.
defaultPrompt: Help me decide what to build for a new project.
Help me decide whether this needs Wayfinder.
Turn this idea into reviewed code.
